title: Hue-Style Chicken Bun
description: A traditional Vietnamese dish featuring tender chicken and soft bun, inspired by the flavors of Hue. This recipe is a delicious and satisfying meal option.

ingredients.name: chicken
ingredients.notes: Boneless and skinless breast or thigh meat

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together tender, bo, and a pinch of salt. Add the chicken and mix to coat.
2. Heat 1 tbsp of buttery in a large pan over medium heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
4. Add the remaining 1 tbsp of buttery to the pan and stir in 2 cups of water.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add the bun to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until softened.
7. Slice the bun in half and top with the cooked chicken.
